ChatDoc
⌕
Open provider →
◈
Claude
claude.ai
↗ ◉
ChatGPT
chatgpt.com
↗ ✦
Gemini
gemini.google.com
↗ ⬡
Copilot
copilot.microsoft.com
↗
Chapters
+ New chapter
§
Your document is empty
Click a provider on the left to open it in a new tab. Chat there, then select all, copy, and paste into the box below — it'll be parsed and added to a chapter.
Paste chat here Go to provider tab → Select All (Ctrl+A) → Copy (Ctrl+C) → Paste here (Ctrl+V)
New Chapter
Review parsed chat
Tag message
Move to chapter
Save / Export
Save back to original format
💾
Save back
Save in the format you loaded from
Or export as a different format
💡 Tip: Use Save as JSON as your portable save file — it preserves chapters, tags and all metadata.
💾
Save as JSON — full fidelity
Preserves chapters, tags, metadata. Load back with "Load doc" on any device.
𝐌↓
Save as Markdown (.md)
Chapters become ## headings. Works in Obsidian, Notion, GitHub.
📄
Save as plain text (.txt)
Simple text file, open in any editor or Word.
📝
Save as Word (.docx)
Formatted Word document with chapter headings.
📋
Copy for Google Docs
Copies formatted text — paste into an open Google Doc.
Load document
Load a previously saved JSON file. This replaces your current document — export a save first if you want to keep it.
📂
Drop any file — .json, .txt, .md, .docx — or browse
JSON · TXT · MD · DOCX · Android: use Paste tab
Open your JSON file → Select All → Copy → paste here
Import
Supports Claude.ai, ChatGPT, Gemini JSON exports, plain text, markdown, Word/Google Doc text, and ChatDoc backups.
⬆
Drop a file here or browse
JSON · TXT · MD · DOCX (paste) · Google Doc (paste)
📲 Install Chat Document for offline access & home screen shortcut
